title: Read-only PMM inventory section in /databases (B-scope of v0.X-multihost-pmm-inventory)
renameReason: Re-numbered from v0.5 → v0.4.3 because PMM inventory is semantically a v0.4 databases extension, not a v0.5 release. The v0.5 label was already taken by the firewall/scheduler/logs scope (already shipped). v0.4.3 reads cleanly in the README roadmap (v0.4 → v0.4.1 → v0.4.2 → v0.4.3) and the package version goes 0.4.2 → 0.4.3 naturally.
directionDecision: Option B (limited integration). DinoPanel surfaces externally-PMM-monitored DBs as a read-only section under /databases. Does NOT commit to multi-host DinoPanel direction. Does NOT merge into one unified table — managed and monitored stay visually separated.

phases.name: PMM listServices client + auth failure handling
Frontend stacked section + Open-in-PMM deep link (per-row metrics dropped per D7)
phases.tests: 0 new (no UI unit tests added — drawer pattern was deferred for the same reasons documented in v0.4.2-pmm-cards-conditional; section is mostly layout glue over the already-tested service layer)

phases.name: Integration tests + v0.4.3 release cut + docs update

resolvedQuestions.Q1_cadence: Refresh-button + fetch on page load. No polling. Operator-driven action (adding DB to PMM) is deliberate; polling wastes API calls.
resolvedQuestions.Q2_ui: Two stacked sections in /databases: 'DinoPanel-managed' (existing table) on top, 'External PMM-monitored' (new read-only panel) below.
resolvedQuestions.Q3_external_row_schema: service-name, engine, host, port + the 4 PMM metric cards + per-row 'Open in PMM' deep link. No connection card, no actions.
resolvedQuestions.Q4_managed_deregistered: Already covered by v0.4.2 — reconcile flips pmmRegistered=false → drawer shows 'not registered' hint. No new work here.
resolvedQuestions.Q5_multihost_lockin: Explicitly avoided. B is pure UX-side fetch, no remote-host data model introduced.
